mapper.update:
update after_sale
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_code = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
after_sale_code = #{afterSaleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
after_sale_num = #{afterSaleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
after_sale_price = #{afterSalePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
apply_after_sale_price = #{applyAfterSalePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_after_status = #{orderAfterStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_after_type = #{orderAfterType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reason_id = #{reasonId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`explain` = #{explain,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_time = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
refund_status = #{refundStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
refund_time = #{refundTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
store_remark = #{storeRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

mapper.select: select, member.mobile, member.user_name from after_sale left join member on member.id = after_sale.member_id where after_sale.after_sale_code = #{afterSaleCode}
